series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to: organizational charts; training manuals; position descriptions; unsolicited resumes and related documents; other administrative documents which have no value once superseded or obsolete.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: six (6) months or superseded or obsolete LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
